tartrazine.label: Tartrazine (E102)
tartrazine.description: Synthetic yellow dye linked to hyperactivity in children and allergic reactions

condition_warnings.child_under_5: Linked to hyperactivity and behavioral issues in children
condition_warnings.nut_allergy: May trigger allergic reactions in sensitive individuals

sunset yellow.label: Sunset Yellow FCF (E110)
sunset yellow.description: Synthetic orange-yellow dye associated with hyperactivity and allergic reactions

condition_warnings.child_under_5: Associated with hyperactivity in children

allura red.label: Allura Red AC (E129)
allura red.description: Synthetic red dye that may cause hyperactivity and allergic reactions

condition_warnings.child_under_5: May worsen hyperactivity in children

brilliant blue.label: Brilliant Blue FCF (E133)
brilliant blue.description: Synthetic blue dye with limited safety concerns but no nutritional value

condition_warnings.child_under_5: Unnecessary additive in children's food

carmoisine.label: Carmoisine (E122)
carmoisine.description: Synthetic red dye linked to allergic reactions and hyperactivity

condition_warnings.child_under_5: Linked to hyperactivity in children

ponceau 4r.label: Ponceau 4R (E124)
ponceau 4r.description: Synthetic red dye associated with allergic and intolerance reactions

condition_warnings.child_under_5: May cause hyperactivity and attention problems

erythrosine.label: Erythrosine (E127)
erythrosine.description: Red dye that may affect thyroid function at high doses

condition_warnings.pregnancy: May affect thyroid function during pregnancy
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Potential thyroid effects in developing children

caramel color.label: Caramel Color (E150)
caramel color.description: Some types (Class III/IV) may contain 4-MEI, a potentially carcinogenic compound

sodium benzoate.label: Sodium Benzoate (E211)
sodium benzoate.description: Preservative that can form benzene (carcinogen) when combined with vitamin C

condition_warnings.child_under_5: May contribute to hyperactivity when combined with artificial colors

potassium sorbate.label: Potassium Sorbate (E202)
potassium sorbate.description: Generally safe preservative but may cause mild skin irritation in sensitive individuals

sodium nitrite.label: Sodium Nitrite (E250)
sodium nitrite.description: Used in processed meats; can form carcinogenic nitrosamines during cooking or digestion

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Nitrosamines may pose developmental risks
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Higher cancer risk with early-life exposure

sodium nitrate.label: Sodium Nitrate (E251)
sodium nitrate.description: Can convert to nitrites in the body and form carcinogenic compounds

condition_warnings.pregnancy: May form compounds harmful during fetal development
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Avoid in young children's diets

bha.label: BHA - Butylated Hydroxyanisole (E320)
bha.description: Antioxidant preservative classified as possibly carcinogenic by IARC

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Classified as possibly carcinogenic; avoid during pregnancy

bht.label: BHT - Butylated Hydroxytoluene (E321)
bht.description: Synthetic antioxidant with disputed safety data

tbhq.label: TBHQ - tert-Butylhydroquinone (E319)
tbhq.description: Synthetic antioxidant that may cause nausea at high doses and has disputed long-term safety

potassium bromate.label: Potassium Bromate (E924)
potassium bromate.description: Flour improver banned in India by FSSAI due to cancer risk. Classified as possibly carcinogenic by IARC

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Banned carcinogen — should not be consumed
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Banned carcinogen — should not be consumed

brominated vegetable oil.label: Brominated Vegetable Oil (BVO)
brominated vegetable oil.description: Emulsifier banned in India. Bromine accumulates in the body and may cause neurological issues

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Bromine can cross the placental barrier
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Risk of bromine accumulation in developing bodies
condition_warnings.kidney_disease: Impaired bromine excretion in kidney disease

aspartame.label: Aspartame (E951)
aspartame.description: Artificial sweetener classified as possibly carcinogenic by IARC in 2023

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Avoid artificial sweeteners during pregnancy as a precaution
condition_warnings.child_under_5: Not recommended for young children

sucralose.label: Sucralose (E955)
sucralose.description: Artificial sweetener that may affect gut bacteria and insulin response

condition_warnings.diabetes: May affect insulin sensitivity despite being calorie-free
condition_warnings.pregnancy: Limited safety data during pregnancy

acesulfame potassium.label: Acesulfame K (E950)
acesulfame potassium.description: Artificial sweetener with limited long-term safety studies

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Crosses the placental barrier; limited safety data

saccharin.label: Saccharin (E954)
saccharin.description: One of the oldest artificial sweeteners with past cancer concerns (later partially cleared)

condition_warnings.pregnancy: Crosses the placenta; best avoided during pregnancy

high fructose corn syrup.label: High Fructose Corn Syrup
high fructose corn syrup.description: Concentrated sweetener linked to obesity, insulin resistance, and fatty liver disease

condition_warnings.diabetes: Causes rapid blood sugar spikes and worsens insulin resistance
condition_warnings.obesity: High calorie density with no nutritional value

corn syrup.label: Corn Syrup
corn syrup.description: Refined sugar with high glycemic index

condition_warnings.diabetes: High glycemic index can spike blood sugar
condition_warnings.obesity: Empty calories contributing to weight gain

invert sugar.label: Invert Sugar
invert sugar.description: Processed sugar mixture that is rapidly absorbed

condition_warnings.diabetes: Rapidly absorbed, causing blood sugar spikes
condition_warnings.obesity: Empty calories contributing to weight gain

dextrose.label: Dextrose
dextrose.description: Pure glucose with very high glycemic index

condition_warnings.diabetes: Pure glucose — highest possible glycemic impact

maltodextrin.label: Maltodextrin
maltodextrin.description: Highly processed starch with a glycemic index higher than table sugar

condition_warnings.diabetes: Glycemic index of 85-105, higher than table sugar

sugar.label: Sugar (Sucrose)
sugar.description: Refined sugar — excessive consumption linked to obesity, diabetes, and tooth decay

condition_warnings.diabetes: Raises blood sugar levels; consume in limited quantities
condition_warnings.obesity: Empty calories that contribute to weight gain

partially hydrogenated.description: Contains trans fats which significantly increase heart disease risk. FSSAI limits trans fat to 2% in oils

condition_warnings.heart_disease: Trans fats are the most harmful fat for heart health

interesterified fat.label: Interesterified Fat
interesterified fat.description: Processed fat used as trans fat replacement; limited long-term safety data

palm oil.description: High in saturated fat; also raises environmental concerns about deforestation

palm kernel oil.description: Very high in saturated fat (over 80%), even higher than palm oil

monosodium glutamate.description: Flavor enhancer permitted by FSSAI within limits. Some people report sensitivity symptoms

disodium guanylate.description: Flavor enhancer often used with MSG; avoid if gout-prone as it contains purines

disodium inosinate.description: Purine-containing flavor enhancer; avoid with gout or uric acid conditions

salt.label: Salt (Sodium Chloride)
salt.description: Excessive salt intake linked to high blood pressure and heart disease

condition_warnings.kidney_disease: Impaired kidneys cannot excrete excess sodium

sodium.label: Sodium / Salt
sodium.description: Excessive sodium intake linked to high blood pressure and heart disease

invert syrup.label: Invert Syrup / Invert Sugar
invert syrup.description: Processed sugar mixture that is rapidly absorbed into the bloodstream

condition_warnings.diabetes: Rapidly absorbed, causing blood sugar spikes
condition_warnings.obesity: Empty calories contributing to weight gain

polysorbate 80.label: Polysorbate 80 (E433)
polysorbate 80.description: Emulsifier that may affect gut barrier function and promote inflammation

carboxymethyl cellulose.label: Carboxymethyl Cellulose (E466)
carboxymethyl cellulose.description: Emulsifier linked to gut inflammation in some animal studies

maida.label: Maida (Refined Wheat Flour)

condition_warnings.lactose_intolerance: Contains lactose — may cause digestive discomfort

peanut.label: Peanut

groundnut.description: Same as peanut — common allergen in Indian products

Tree nut allergen — avoid if allergic

diabetes.label: Diabetes
diabetes.description: Flags high-sugar, high-GI ingredients and artificial sweeteners

heart_disease.description: Flags trans fats, saturated fats, and excess sodium
